title: poa wheeleri
intro: Poa wheeleri, also known as Wheeler's bluegrass, is a species of grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa wheeleri include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared through herbal infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
